name: Teto [WhatchaCallItsName]
description:
“I couldn’t find your whatchacallitsname!”

══════════════════

Does anyone actually care about this song? I hope people do because I did enough to make this!!!

Gender is intentionally ambiguous cause I really liked the idea of them being possibly trans masc, but really it should be solidified in chat. Might possibly lead to inconsistency though.
